description: Desktop Pet System - 基于 Electron 的桌面宠物应用，支持待机/行走/跳跃/拖拽/坠落等行为，采用插件式行为架构

userStories.title: 搭建 Electron + TypeScript 项目骨架
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an Electron + TypeScript project scaffold with transparent, frameless, always-on-top window so that all pet features can be built on top of it.
acceptanceCriteria: Initialize project with package.json, tsconfig.json, and Vite as bundler
Electron main process written in TypeScript
Main window configured: transparent background, frameless, always-on-top, skip-taskbar
Window covers full primary screen for free movement
Mouse click-through enabled on non-pet areas using setIgnoreMouseEvents(true, { forward: true })
npm run dev starts the app and shows a placeholder circle sprite
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed 2025-05-13. Electron main process, transparent window, Vite bundler, placeholder circle sprite all working.

userStories.title: 动画渲染层：Lottie/SVG 播放器组件
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an animation player component that can load, play, loop, and switch animation clips so that behaviors can trigger visual feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: Create AnimationPlayer class/component supporting Lottie JSON or SVG sprite sheets
API: play(clipName), stop(), setLoop(boolean), onComplete callback
Switching clips has no visible flicker or position jump
Include one placeholder idle-breathing animation asset for testing
Render the animation in the Electron renderer process
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed 2025-05-13. AnimationPlayer class with lottie-web integration, play/stop/setLoop/onComplete API. 5 unit tests passing.

userStories.title: 事件总线 (EventBus)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a typed event bus for decoupled communication between behaviors and system modules.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement EventBus with on(event, handler), off(event, handler), emit(event, payload)
Typed events via TypeScript generics or event map interface
Predefined event types: mouse:down, mouse:up, mouse:move, edge:hit, behavior:changed
Unit tests: subscribe, emit, unsubscribe, multiple listeners
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed 2025-05-13. Typed EventBus with EventMap interface, 5 unit tests passing.

userStories.title: 行为接口与注册表 (Behavior interface + BehaviorRegistry)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a Behavior plugin interface and registry so that behaviors can be independently registered and discovered.
acceptanceCriteria: Define Behavior interface: id, priority, enter(ctx), update(ctx, dt), exit(ctx), canTransitionTo(nextId)
Define BehaviorContext type containing: position, velocity, animationPlayer, eventBus, config
Implement BehaviorRegistry: register(behavior), unregister(id), get(id), getAll()
Include one no-op ExampleBehavior to prove registration works
Unit tests: register, unregister, duplicate-id rejection
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed 2025-05-13. Behavior interface + BehaviorRegistry with register/unregister/get/getAll/has. 5 unit tests passing.

userStories.title: 行为状态机 (BehaviorStateMachine)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a state machine that manages the current behavior, handles transitions, and respects priority.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement BehaviorStateMachine: start(initialBehaviorId), requestTransition(id, reason), getCurrentBehavior()
On transition: call current.exit(), then next.enter()
Higher priority behaviors can interrupt lower priority ones
Lower priority cannot interrupt higher unless current behavior allows via canTransitionTo
Emit behavior:changed event on EventBus after each transition
Unit tests: normal transition, priority preemption, rejected transition
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed 2025-05-13. BehaviorStateMachine with priority-based transitions, 7 unit tests passing.

userStories.title: 屏幕边界感知模块
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a module that provides screen bounds and taskbar position so behaviors can respect physical edges.
acceptanceCriteria: Use Electron screen API to get primary display workArea (x, y, width, height)
Expose getGroundY(): number returning the Y coordinate of the ground (top of taskbar)
Expose getBounds(): { left, right, top, bottom } for movement clamping
Listen for display-metrics-changed and update bounds automatically
Unit tests with mocked screen data
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed 2025-05-13. ScreenBoundsProvider with getBounds/getGroundY/update. 4 unit tests passing.

userStories.title: 待机行为 (IdleBehavior)
userStories.description: As a user, I want the pet to show a natural idle state with occasional micro-animations when nothing is happening.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement IdleBehavior registered with priority 0 (lowest)
On enter: play idle-breathing loop animation
Every 5-15 seconds (random), trigger a micro-action animation (yawn, look around)
Pet position remains unchanged during idle
canTransitionTo returns true for any behavior (can always be interrupted)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed 2025-05-13. IdleBehavior with random timeout (3-8s) then transition to walk. 5 unit tests.

userStories.title: 行走行为 (WalkBehavior)
userStories.description: As a user, I want the pet to walk around the screen on its own so it feels alive.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement WalkBehavior: pick a random target X on the ground, move toward it at 60-120 px/s
Flip sprite horizontally based on movement direction
Play walk animation loop during movement
Stop and transition to IdleBehavior when target reached
Clamp movement within screen bounds (getBounds())
canTransitionTo returns true for higher-priority behaviors (Drag)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed 2025-05-13. WalkBehavior with edge detection, direction flip, random duration. 7 unit tests.

userStories.title: 跳跃行为 (JumpBehavior)
userStories.description: As a user, I want the pet to occasionally jump to make the scene more lively.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement JumpBehavior: parabolic arc trajectory (configurable height and horizontal distance)
Play jump-start animation on launch, jump-land animation on landing
Landing detected when Y >= groundY
After landing, transition to IdleBehavior
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed 2025-05-13. JumpBehavior with parabolic arc, gravity, landing detection. 7 unit tests.

userStories.title: 拖拽行为 (DragBehavior)
userStories.description: As a user, I want to grab the pet with my mouse and drag it anywhere on screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement DragBehavior with highest priority (100)
Enter on mouse:down event over pet sprite hit area
Pet position follows mouse position with no perceptible lag
Play grabbed/surprised animation during drag
On mouse:up: calculate release velocity from last N mouse positions
If release velocity < threshold -> transition to IdleBehavior
If release velocity >= threshold -> transition to FallBehavior
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed 2025-05-13. DragBehavior with priority 100, mouse tracking, velocity calculation, transition to fall. 6 unit tests.

userStories.title: 坠落行为 (FallBehavior)
userStories.description: As a user, when I release the pet from a height it should fall naturally with gravity.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement FallBehavior: apply gravity acceleration (configurable, default ~980 px/s²)
Pet falls vertically until reaching groundY
On landing: play impact animation with slight bounce (1-2 small bounces)
After bounce settles, transition to IdleBehavior
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed 2025-05-13. FallBehavior with gravity, bounce damping, settle detection. 6 unit tests.

userStories.title: 鼠标交互事件桥接
userStories.description: As a developer, I need mouse events from the Electron window to be bridged into the EventBus so behaviors can react to user input.
acceptanceCriteria: Listen for mousedown, mouseup, mousemove on the pet sprite element
Emit mouse:down, mouse:up, mouse:move events on EventBus with coordinates
Toggle setIgnoreMouseEvents based on whether cursor is over pet hit area
Track mouse velocity (last 5 positions) for release-speed calculation
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed 2025-05-13. MouseBridge with event bridging, velocity tracking (last 5 positions), jsdom tests. BehaviorScheduler with weighted random transitions. 4+5 unit tests.

userStories.title: 用户点击响应（单击/双击/右键）
userStories.description: As a user, I want clicking the pet to produce feedback so it feels interactive and companionable.
acceptanceCriteria: Single click: play a happy/petted animation then return to previous behavior
Double click: trigger JumpBehavior
Right click: show context menu with items: Exit, Hide 30min (placeholder), Settings (placeholder)
Context menu uses Electron Menu API
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-05-14. Added click/dblclick/contextmenu MouseBridge events, PettingBehavior happy reaction with return to previous behavior, double-click JumpBehavior trigger, and Electron Menu IPC context menu with Exit / Hide 30min / Settings. Covered by jsdom and platform IPC tests.

userStories.title: 自动行为调度器 (AutoScheduler)
userStories.description: As a user, I want the pet to naturally cycle between idle, walk, and jump on its own when I'm not interacting with it.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement AutoScheduler: when current behavior completes, pick next by weighted random
Default weights configurable: Idle 60%, Walk 30%, Jump 10%
Cooldown per behavior (e.g., Jump cannot trigger again within 20s)
Pause scheduling for N seconds after any user interaction (click/drag)
AutoScheduler is a standalone module, does not import specific behaviors
Unit tests: weight distribution over many iterations, cooldown enforcement, interaction pause
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-05-14. Enhanced BehaviorScheduler with PRD default weights (Idle 60 / Walk 30 / Jump 10), weighted distribution test, per-behavior cooldowns, interaction pause, and PetRuntime integration. Scheduler remains standalone and imports no concrete behaviors.

userStories.title: 配置持久化 (ConfigStore)
userStories.description: As a user, I want my preferences (walk speed, behavior weights) to be saved between sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Store config in user data directory as config.json (use Electron app.getPath('userData'))
Implement ConfigStore: get(key, default), set(key, value), onChange(key, callback)
Generate default config on first launch
Behaviors read their parameters from ConfigStore
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-05-14. Added ConfigStore persisted to app.getPath('userData')/config.json with get/set/onChange, default config generation, config IPC/preload bridge, and behavior parameter reads for idle, walk, jump, and fall.

userStories.title: 系统托盘与应用生命周期
userStories.description: As a user, I want the pet app to live in the system tray so I can show/hide/quit it easily.
acceptanceCriteria: Create system tray icon with context menu: Show Pet, Hide Pet, Quit
Closing the window hides to tray instead of quitting
Tray double-click toggles pet visibility
App correctly cleans up on quit (save config, dispose resources)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed 2026-05-14. Added TrayController, system tray menu (Show Pet / Hide Pet / Quit), close-to-tray lifecycle, tray double-click toggle, startup hidden-to-tray behavior, and tray cleanup on quit. 4 tray-controller tests passing.

userStories.title: 边缘碰撞处理（转身/反弹）
userStories.description: As a user, I want the pet to turn around or bounce when hitting screen edges so it never disappears off-screen.
acceptanceCriteria: During WalkBehavior: if pet reaches left/right edge, flip direction and continue or transition to Idle
During FallBehavior: clamp horizontal position within bounds
Edge collision emits edge:hit event on EventBus
Behavior is configurable: bounce vs turn-around (default: turn-around)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: 游戏循环与性能优化
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a stable game loop driving behavior updates at consistent frame rate with low resource usage.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement game loop using requestAnimationFrame with delta-time calculation
Call currentBehavior.update(ctx, dt) each frame
When pet is idle and no animation playing, reduce update frequency (e.g., skip frames or use setTimeout fallback)
CPU usage < 2% during idle state on mid-range laptop
Memory usage < 200MB
No memory leaks after 1 hour of running (verify via DevTools heap snapshot)
Typecheck passes
